text: Where focus goes, energy flows.
author: Tony Robbins

text: Concentrate all your thoughts upon the work at hand. The sun's rays do not burn until brought to a focus.
author: Alexander Graham Bell

text: The difference between successful people and really successful people is that really successful people say no to almost everything.
author: Warren Buffett

text: You can do anything, but not everything.
One task. Full attention. No excuses.
Clarity precedes mastery.
Distraction is the enemy of greatness. Protect your attention like your life depends on it.
The quality of your focus determines the quality of your results.
Your phone is not a reward. It is an interruption.
Deep work is the superpower of the 21st century.
author: Cal Newport

text: The more you chase two rabbits, the more you catch none.
If you are everywhere, you are nowhere.
Guard your attention. It is the most valuable thing you own.
It's not about having time. It's about making time for what matters.
Eliminate the noise. Execute on what counts.
Boredom is a signal to go deeper, not to switch tasks.
The ability to focus is a skill. Train it like one.
Multitasking is just doing multiple things poorly at once.
What you give your attention to, you give your life to.
Finish what you start. The world is full of half-done things.
